title: samples_roh_per_sample_v1 — per-sample ROH segment row
description: One row per called Run-of-Homozygosity segment for one sample. ROH are detected by ngsF-HMM on genotype likelihoods (no hard-call bias at low coverage) — see catfish-diversity-analysis/docs/methods/MODULE_3_methods.md §A03-A04. Length bins follow the demographic convention: short (<1 Mb, ancestral bottlenecks), medium (1-5 Mb, historical inbreeding), long (>5 Mb, recent inbreeding). NOTE: as of 2026-05-20 the diversity_roh root is empty on disk — this schema is published in advance so the wiring is ready when the pipeline ships the per-sample segment tables.

sample.description: CGA-prefixed sample identifier. One sample contributes many rows (one per segment).

chrom.description: Chromosome label matching the reference FASTA header (e.g. 'C_gar_LG01').

start_bp.description: ROH segment start coordinate in base pairs (1-based, inclusive).

end_bp.description: ROH segment end coordinate (1-based, inclusive). end_bp >= start_bp.

length_bp.description: Segment length in bp = end_bp - start_bp + 1. Used to bucket into the short/medium/long length classes.

length_class.description: Demographic length class: short < 1 Mb, medium ∈ [1 Mb, 5 Mb], long > 5 Mb. See MODULE_3 §A04 for the rationale.

n_sites.description: Number of callable sites within the segment. Used as a denominator for in-ROH heterozygosity computation.

het_in_roh.description: Heterozygosity computed within this ROH segment (expected to be near zero; nonzero values flag mis-calls or recombinant segments). null when n_sites = 0.

posterior_min.description: Minimum per-site IBD posterior across the segment (from ngsF-HMM). Useful for calibrating the threshold that converted posteriors → discrete segment calls. null when not reported.

posterior_mean.description: Mean per-site IBD posterior across the segment. null when not reported.

seed.description: The ngsF-HMM random seed (1 of 10 replicates ∈ 42..51) of the replicate whose call set was retained (the one with the highest log-likelihood). null when not recorded.

_provenance.ngsf_hmm: 10 random restarts (seeds 42-51), retained the replicate with highest log-likelihood
_provenance.on_disk: diversity_roh root → per_sample/<sample>.roh.tsv  (NOT YET WRITTEN; layer disabled in layers.registry.json)
_provenance._status: 2026-05-20: schema published in advance; the producing pipeline step is still pending. See _handoff_docs/MISSING_DATA.md §2.
